problem_solved: Primary care access limited to 9-5, with 7-10 month waits to see physicians and 3-4 months for diagnostic/specialty visits
solution_description: AI-powered virtual primary care platform that integrates with top health systems. AI Physician Mode automates intake and provides clinical insights, enabling providers to focus on personalized care. 24/7 access model with single medical record integration. 10M+ medical chats completed
traction_signals: Partnerships with Hartford HealthCare, Hackensack Meridian Health, Cedars-Sinai
Single medical record with brick-and-mortar integration
CEO endorsements from major health system partners
notes: Strong US health system partnerships. Hybrid model connecting virtual and in-person care. High-profile endorsements (Hartford HealthCare, Cedars-Sinai CEOs). Not yet EU-focused but model is transferable
